{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Destroyers
| introduced = Waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]] does not want to share a world with miniature [[Destroyers]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c9">''Waybound'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Lifeforms]]
